content.title: Cất Cánh (Takeoff) Fellowship Program
content.subtitle_vi: Bệ phóng cho trí tuệ Việt
content.subtitle_en: The launch pad for Viet talent
content.footer: Founded by Dr. Loi Nguyen & VISEMI Foundation

content.title: Cất Cánh (Takeoff) Fellowship Introduction
content.meta_band: Founded by Dr. Loi Nguyen (Executive VP Emeritus, Marvell) & VISEMI Foundation

gaps.body: Global technical talent shortage in high-level semiconductors and advanced tech.
With limited local MS and PhD opportunities, fully funded programs in the USA, Taiwan, Korea, Japan, and the EU offer strong paths for talented STEM students.
Based on surveys and interviews, top STEM talent faces severe financial, language, and strategic barriers that limit access to overseas education.

bridge.body: Delivers a structured 6-month accelerator to help students successfully pursue fully funded graduate programs overseas.
Breaks down barriers via a tiered financial support and milestone-based financial funding.
Connects fellows with VISEMI's network of local ambassadors and tech leaders.
Builds an alumni flywheel model where every fellow commits to mentoring the next cohort.

pillars.title: Pillar 1: Intensive Preparation
pillars.body: Structured English training and strategic application coaching.

pillars.title: Pillar 2: Milestone Funding
pillars.body: Up to $15K per student covering English learning, testing, conference, application, and basic needs.

pillars.title: Pillar 3: Global Mentorship
pillars.body: Pair with local ambassadors and worldwide experts for application coaching and long-term placement strategy.

tiers.title: Tier 1: Full Support Grant ($8K-$15K)
tiers.body: Full support for students with excellent academic records and documented financial hardship.

tiers.title: Tier 2: Application Grant ($4K-$5K)
tiers.body: Targeted funding for English and application gaps.

tiers.title: Tier 3 & 4: Mentorship Grant (~$1K)
tiers.body: Strategic network access and early research exposure.

content.title: Transformative Impact with Unmatched ROI

stats.label: Fellows Funded (5-Year Goal)
bullets: Escalate to a global Viet tech talent network with a budget under $2M.

footnotes: *An individual grant to bridge English language, research, admission fees.
**Total degree value, paid entirely by the destination host university or secured scholarship programs.

content.title: Partner With Us to Nurture Viet Talent

tiers.name: Founding Partner
bullets: A seat on the Cất Cánh Advisory Board.
Quarterly strategy dialogues with program leadership.
Featured on website, impact report, and media announcements.
Curated access to fellows and alumni for mentoring and talent.

tiers.name: Leadership Circle
bullets: Invitation to an annual leadership roundtable with Founding Partners and mentors.
Featured on the website and in the annual impact report.
Curated introductions to selected fellows in relevant fields.

tiers.name: Strategic Fellow Sponsor
bullets: Name one Cất Cánh Strategic Fellow.
Donor name on the fellow's profile and program materials.
Recognition in announcements, impact reports, and websites.

tiers.name: Application Grantor
bullets: Recognition in announcements, impact reports, and websites.
Invitation to selected networking and program events.
Group briefing on cohort outcomes at the end of the cycle.

tiers.name: Ecosystem Contributor
bullets: Name listed on Cất Cánh donor pages and in the impact report.
Invitation to VISEMI community events where feasible.

content.qr_caption: Scan the QR code to fill out our Partner Interest Form and connect with our founding team.
content.footer:
The Cất Cánh Fellowship Program, founded by Dr. Loi Nguyen and VISEMI Foundation, is administered by VISEMI Foundation, a registered 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization, ensuring transparent and tax-deductible support.
